subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants of the Lord Abraham! Jinab-i-Aqa Shukru'llah, in the luminous Spot, remembered the loved ones and raised his voice in prayer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق رب ابراهیم جناب آقا شکرالله در بقعه نوراء بیاد احباء افتاد و بدعا
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
